source: UniProt REST API, reviewed:true AND database:pdb plus category-specific filters

queries.query: reviewed:true AND database:pdb AND (protein_name:actin OR protein_name:tubulin OR protein_name:collagen OR protein_name:keratin OR protein_name:myosin)
reviewed:true AND database:pdb AND (protein_name:fluorescent OR protein_name:GFP OR protein_name:luminescent)

validation.uniprotIds: All entries were returned by UniProtKB search with reviewed:true and database:pdb.
validation.pdbIds: PDB IDs are UniProt xref_pdb values and are formatted as four-character RCSB PDB accessions.

licenseHandling.approach: Conservative static redistribution: store minimal factual index fields and outbound links; do not redistribute modified UniProt narrative annotation text.
licenseHandling.uniprot: Records were discovered through UniProt REST API; attribution and links are retained for each accession.
licenseHandling.rcsbPdb: Stored PDB IDs were validated through RCSB Data API and link to RCSB structure pages.
licenseHandling.note: This is not legal advice; review source terms before public release.

notes: Includes 6 curated genetic-disease proteins added 2026-06-17 (SMN1, CFTR, HBB, PAH, HEXA, DMD).
